name: Role-based Training Planner
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To use the training planner:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://forms.zohopublic.com/virtualoffice112/form/RoleBasedTrainingPlan2022/formperma/6lSjyi9OloZnudyZ3zOPdTgYVrJt2nUCdctiBY0bRHQ", "children": [{"text": "here"}]}, {"text": " to go to the "}, {"text": "Build your training plan", "bold": true}, {"text": " form."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/Screenshot20241007at54117AM.05TJ100000HkoyQMAR.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/Screenshot20241007at54117AM.05TJ100000HkoyQMAR.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "User-added image", "width": 800, "height": 586}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enter the "}, {"text": "staff details", "bold": true}, {"text": " below"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select the role/s", "bold": true}, {"text": " by ticking the associated box next to each role (a list of the content will be displayed)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Create my training plan!", "bold": true}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You will be able to download the training plan as a PDF file to save and refer to later as required."}]}]
